title: Wishing Well
lyrics: Oh yeah, I can't breathe, can't breathe, I can't breathe When I exhale, I touch my pain with my wishes and I wish them well I can't breathe, I'm waiting for the exhale Touch my pain with my wishes and I wish them well Still no life, but oh well I still try even though I know I'm gon' fail Stress on my shoulder like an anvil Work it got me itching like I need help Throat's killing me, I'm bleeding on help Sometimes I just don't know how to fail Phone call from depression Use my past and my memories as a weapon On the other line, talk talk to addiction Speaking of the drugs, I miss them This can't be real, is it fiction? Something is broken again I cry out for help, do they listen? I'ma be alone until the finish This is the part where I tell you I'm fine but I'm lying I just don't want you to worry This is the part where I take all my feelings and hide them Cause I don't want nobody to hurt me, can't breathe I'm waiting for the exhale Touch my pain with my wishes and I wish them well Still no life, but oh well I still try even though I know I'm gon' fail Stress on my shoulder like an anvil Work it got me itching like I need help Drugs are killing me, I'm bleeding on help Sometimes I just don't know how to fail Hell, but let's keep it real If it wasn't for these pills, I wouldn't be here What if I keep taking these pills, I wouldn't be here Yeah, must have told you all my secrets Yeah, they're killing me to pieces I really think I need them I stopped taking the drugs and then the drugs take me This is the part where I tell you I'm fine but I'm lying Cause I just don't want you to worry This is the part where I take all my feelings and hide them Cause I don't want nobody to hurt me, can't breathe I'm waiting for the exhale Touch my pain with my wishes and I wish them well Still no life, but oh well Still try even though I know I'm gon' fail Stress on my shoulder like an anvil Work it got me itching like I need help Drugs are killing me, I'm bleeding on help Sometimes I just don't know how to fail Sometimes I just don't know how to feel This is the part where I tell you I'm fine This is the part where I take all my feelings and hide them Cause I don't want nobody to hurt me, can't breathe  Touch my pain with my wishes and I wish them well  Stress on my shoulder like an anvil   Sometimes I just don't know how to feel This is the part where I tell you I'm fine

If it wasn't for these pills, I wouldn't be here

Yeah, must have told you all my secrets
Yeah, they're killing me to pieces
I really think I need them
I stopped taking the drugs and then the drugs take me
This is the part where I tell you I'm fine but I'm lying
Cause I just don't want you to worry
